notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.12.3 Added dot size adjustments for HR Diagram. Updated headless syqon runners to use shortcuts and function bundles. Bug fix with autocrop in stacking suite. Bug fix in signature insert adder. V1.12.2 Added Remove Satellite Trails to the Light Calibration Tab. Fixed rejection map bug. Fixed exposure tolerance on splitting dual narrowband images. Updated UI logos. V1.12.1 Workflows support multiple branches, see the precanned mono narrowband workflow for an example. CC Darkstar engine now benefits from the same speed boost architecture that sharpen and denoise are using.  V1.12.0 Introducing Workflows in SASpro. Find it under the Menu bar Workflows. Workflows are to help guide you in your processing, load up a pre canned workflow if you have no idea where to start your processing journey, create your own, or even share workflows with each other!. Cosmic Clarity DarkStar AI4: Major upgrade to DarkStar bringing my AI4 architecture to star removal.
